title: Small Tweaks
description: A small way to improve your game!
body:
# Welcome to Small Tweaks, a small way to improve your game!

## Features:

- Randomized creeper fuses
- Better Ender Dragon drops
- Better zombie drops
- Players drop their heads
- Shield nerf, getting hit while using a shield gives you hunger
- Armor nerf, getting hit while wearing diamond or netherite gives hunger
- Stone has a chance to drop iron and gold nuggets
- Mobs can stomp torches out
- And even more features!

## License:

- You may not redistribute this project
- You may use in YouTube videos as long as you leave some form of credit
- You may use in public servers
- You may not copy or steal code from this project
- If you have any questions about license, please ask below
# 
# Enjoy!
